title: Evidence Manifest Record
description: Schema for a single evidence item in the JLAW chain-of-custody manifest. Records are descriptive and do not constitute legal findings. Inclusion does not imply wrongdoing by any party.

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence item. Use a stable, sequential format such as 'EV-0001'.

title.description: Short descriptive title for this evidence item.

source_type.description: High-level category of the source document.

source_origin.description: Organization or system from which this document originated (e.g., 'SEC EDGAR', 'Beckwood Press Inc.', 'Nike Inc. internal').

date_created.description: Date the source document was originally created or published (YYYY-MM-DD). Null if unknown.

date_obtained.description: Date this item was obtained and added to the evidence workspace (YYYY-MM-DD).

custodian.description: Name or identifier of the person or system responsible for maintaining this evidence item.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file within this repository, e.g., 'data/evidence/sec_filings/0000320187_10-K_2019.htm'.

hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file as obtained. Used to verify integrity.

confidentiality_level.description: Access restriction level for this item.

legal_domain.description: Legal or regulatory domains potentially relevant to this item.

related_claims.description: List of claim IDs (from the claim verification matrix) that this evidence item supports or contradicts.

related_entities.description: Names of companies, individuals, or systems referenced in or relevant to this evidence item.

evidence_strength.description: Strength rating on a 1–5 scale. 5 = direct documentary proof; 1 = weak or speculative.

firsthand_observation.description: True if this item includes or is derived from firsthand observation or testimony.

documentary_support.description: True if this item is a primary source document (record, filing, log, etc.) rather than a derived or testimonial account.

inference_required.description: True if using this item to support a claim requires inferential reasoning beyond what the document directly states.

verification_needed.description: True if this item has not yet been independently verified against corroborating sources.

notes.description: Additional context, limitations, or chain-of-custody notes for this evidence item.
